description: The 'Ndrina Pititto is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Mileto, Vibo Valentia, Italy. Their illegal activities include extortion and drug trafficking. They were involved in the Stammer operation, which seized 8 tons of cocaine in 2017. The clan has been active since at least the 1980s.

country_links.context: The organization sources cocaine from Colombia.
The organization routes cocaine through the Netherlands.
The organization routes cocaine through Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: ma veniva distribuita anche nel Regno Unito
country_links.context: The organization distributes cocaine in the United Kingdom.
